business_name: Norwood Pressure Washing / Mobile Auto Detailing Service
tagline: Pressure washing that restores your property — plus mobile auto detailing that comes to you. Powerful, careful, and locally trusted across Stockbridge.
proof_note: No star rating or review count is published or independently verifiable on Google, Yelp, Nextdoor, or BBB (Yelp blocked; BBB shows A+ grade + 1 visible review; Nextdoor shows no aggregate). Verified facts only: business exists across Yelp/BBB/Nextdoor/Thumbtack/Facebook, established 2016 (as Elijah Pressure Washing, rebranded Norwood 2017), A+ BBB rating, real pressure-washing + mobile auto-detailing trade in Stockbridge GA. Prior 4.9/83 figures were unverifiable and removed.
services_intro: From soft-washing your home's exterior to lifting years of grime off concrete — and a full mobile detail that brings the showroom shine to your driveway — we match the right method to every surface.

services.title: House & Soft Washing
services.desc: Gentle, low-pressure soft washing that strips mildew, algae, and grime from siding, brick, and stucco without damaging the surface or surrounding landscaping.

services.title: Driveway, Walkway & Patio Cleaning
services.desc: High-powered surface cleaning that lifts years of dirt, oil, and stains from concrete driveways, sidewalks, walkways, and patios for a like-new finish.

services.title: Commercial & Heavy Equipment Cleaning
services.desc: Reliable pressure washing for commercial properties and heavy equipment, keeping storefronts, lots, and machinery clean, professional, and ready for work.

reviews_note: No verbatim customer testimonials and no aggregate star rating / review count are published or independently verifiable. Site displays only verified proof: A+ BBB rating + locally owned since 2016. No invented quotes, no fabricated review counts.
about_paragraph: Norwood Pressure Washing & Mobile Auto Detailing is a locally owned service company serving Stockbridge and the surrounding area since 2016. We pair high-powered exterior cleaning — soft washing for delicate siding and brick, full-pressure restoration for concrete, driveways, and commercial lots — with a mobile auto detailing service that brings a deep, showroom-quality clean right to your driveway. A+ rated with the Better Business Bureau.
